title: Add support for function calls in with statements
body:
Currently on master, function calls inside `with` statements are verilated without errors, but compilation of generated cpp files fails. The errors are thrown, because function calls are moved outside `with` statements, but have references to `with` variables.

This PR fixes it. It allows AstWith node to have a list of statements and converts the return expression to `AstCReturn` (as a comment proposes). It is a statement, so the function call is moved just before it, but remains in `with` statement.

The test with a class tests the case when `AstWith` node is revisited in V3Task.cpp.
